name: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders
original_name: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders
overview: Social Media Influencers seem to have it all — money, celebrity, power. But in these shocking true crime stories, there is a horrifying dark side to the fame, which reveals how these online dreams can quickly become blood-soaked nightmares.

trailers.title: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders - First Look | ID
